name: Desert Prince: Relic Run
summary: Dash through the dunes and reclaim the ancient relics! In Desert Prince: Relic Run, step into a high-stakes endless runner where every leap counts. Dodge relentless guards, slide under dangerous traps, and navigate the vibrant markets of the East. Collect golden coins and powerful artifacts to unlock legendary skins and magical upgrades. How far can you run in this ultimate desert quest?
